meta.title: DEF CON 29 - Agent X - A look inside security at the New York Times
meta.description: This talk will cover the unique threats and challenges of working in information security for a news organization. Some best practices for journalists, hard technical problems facing media security, and how hackers can get involved. This talk is for both hackers and journalists.
